summary: This document is a Software Validation Form within the Quality Management System for the 'AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform'. It outlines the intended use, risk management criteria, and validation plan structure for the AI phone agent software. Several sections regarding specific risk assessments and test plans appear to be headers without detailed content filled in.
